response.rule: Start at 16 and add successive prime squares
Multiply successively by 11, 12, 13 and add alternating consecutive primes
Odd positions are Catalan numbers; even positions are powers of 3
Add cubes of successive composite integers starting at 6
Double the previous term and add alternating parity quadratic corrections
